lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਹਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਆਗੈ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam sahaaee sadaa sang aagai le chhaddaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Naam is your Companion; it shall always be with you. It shall save you in the world hereafter. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har har naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਕੀਆ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਕਵਨੈ ਆਵਹਿ ਕਾਮਿ ॥
lines.translit: duneea keea vaddiaaeea kavanai aaveh kaam |
lines.english: What good is worldly greatness?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਸਭੁ ਫਿਕਾ ਜਾਤੋ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਨਿਦਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa kaa rang sabh fikaa jaato binas nidaan |
lines.english: All the pleasures of Maya are tasteless and insipid. In the end, they shall all fade away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਸੋ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa kai hiradai har vasai so pooraa paradhaan |2|
lines.english: Perfectly fulfilled and supremely acclaimed is the one, in whose heart the Lord abides. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਾਵ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਸਗਲ ਛਡਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: aupaav siaanap sagal chhadd gur kee charanee laag |
lines.english: Give up all your schemes and your clever mental tricks, and fall at the Feet of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਕੀ ਹੋਹੁ ਰੇਣੁਕਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo kee hohu renukaa apanaa aap tiaag |
lines.english: Become the dust of the Saints; renounce your selfishness and conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਭਾਗੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tiseh paraapat ratan hoe jis masatak hovai bhaag |3|
lines.english: He alone receives the Jewel, upon whose forehead such wondrous destiny is written. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੈ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਭਾਈਹੋ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: tisai paraapat bhaaeeho jis devai prabh aap |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, it is received only when God Himself bestows it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sevaa so kare jis binasai haumai taap |
lines.english: People serve the True Guru only when the fever of egotism has been eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਗਲ ਸੰਤਾਪ ॥੪॥੮॥੭੮॥
lines.translit: naanak kau gur bhettiaa binase sagal santaap |4|8|78|
lines.english: Nanak has met the Guru; all his sufferings have come to an end. ||4||8||78||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਪਛਾਣੂ ਜੀਅ ਕਾ ਇਕੋ ਰਖਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik pachhaanoo jeea kaa iko rakhanahaar |
lines.english: The One is the Knower of all beings; He alone is our Savior.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis saranaaee sadaa sukh paarabraham karataar |1|
lines.english: In His Sanctuary there is eternal peace. He is the Supreme Lord God, the Creator. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸ ਕਾ ਮਨਿ ਆਸਰਾ ਇਕੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikas kaa man aasaraa iko praan adhaar |
lines.english: The One is the Support of the mind; the One is the Support of the breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਗਲ ਉਪਾਵ ਤਿਆਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mere sagal upaav tiaag |
lines.english: O my mind, give up all these efforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਆਰਾਧਿ ਨਿਤ ਇਕਸੁ ਕੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa aaraadh nit ikas kee liv laag |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Dwell upon the Perfect Guru each day, and attach yourself to the One Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੋ ਭਾਈ ਮਿਤੁ ਇਕੁ ਇਕੋ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: eiko bhaaee mit ik iko maat pitaa |
lines.english: The One is my Brother, the One is my Friend. The One is my Mother and Father.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਵਸਿ ਕੀਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so prabh manahu na visarai jin sabh kichh vas keetaa |2|
lines.english: May I never forget God from my mind; He holds all in the Power of His Hands. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸ ਕੀ ਮਨਿ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਦਿਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: eikas kee man ttek hai jin jeeo pindd ditaa |
lines.english: The One is the Support of the mind; He has given us body and soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਏ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh jin kee aatth pehar tis jaap |
lines.english: Meditate twenty-four hours a day on the One who created all beings and creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar iko baahar iko thaan thanantar aap |
lines.english: The One is within the home of the self, and the One is outside as well. He Himself is in all places and interspaces.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham prabh ek hai doojaa naahee koe |
lines.english: There is only the One Supreme Lord God; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਸੋਗ ਸੰਤਾਪੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eikas setee ratiaa na hovee sog santaap |3|
lines.english: Attuned to the Love of the One, there is no sorrow or suffering. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪੂਰਾ ਭਇਆ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੯॥੭੯॥
lines.translit: gur poorai pooraa bheaa jap naanak sachaa soe |4|9|79|
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, one becomes perfect; O Nanak, meditate on the True One. ||4||9||79||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh tis kaa jo tis bhaavai su hoe |
lines.english: Soul and body all belong to Him; whatever pleases His Will comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਸੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਪਰਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa satigur siau chit laaeaa se poore paradhaan |
lines.english: Those who focus their consciousness on the True Guru are perfectly fulfilled and famous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਤਿਨ ਉਪਜੈ ਮਨਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau aap deaal hoe tin upajai man giaan |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom wells up in the minds of those unto whom the Lord Himself shows Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin kau masatak likhiaa tin paaeaa har naam |1|
lines.english: Those who have such destiny written upon their foreheads obtain the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere eko naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Name of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਸੁਖ ਊਪਜਹਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sukhaa sukh aoopajeh daragah paidhaa jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The happiness of all happiness shall well up, and in the Court of the Lord, you shall be dressed in robes of honor. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਗਇਆ ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਗੋਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran kaa bhau geaa bhaau bhagat gopaal |
lines.english: The fear of death and rebirth is removed by performing loving devotional service to the Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sangat niramalaa aap kare pratipaal |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one becomes immaculate and pure; the Lord Himself takes care of such a one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam maran kee mal katteeai gur darasan dekh nihaal |2|
lines.english: The filth of birth and death is washed away, and one is uplifted, beholding the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar rav rahiaa paarabraham prabh soe |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God is pervading all places and interspaces.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa daataa ek hai doojaa naahee koe |
lines.english: The One is the Giver of all-there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਪਰਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jin man vasiaa paarabraham se poore paradhaan |
lines.english: Perfectly fulfilled and famous are those, in whose minds the Supreme Lord God abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਕੀਤਾ ਲੋੜੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis saranaaee chhutteeai keetaa lorre su hoe |3|
lines.english: In His Sanctuary, one is saved. Whatever He wishes, comes to pass. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੁਰਬਾਨ ॥੪॥੧੦॥੮੦॥
lines.translit: jinee meraa prabh dhiaaeaa naanak tin kurabaan |4|10|80|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those who meditate on my God. ||4||10||80||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੀ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਭਈ ਜਹਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee sobhaa niramalee paragatt bhee jahaan |
lines.english: Their reputation is spotless and pure; they are famous all over the world.
